nodes.label: AI for robotic repetitive tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I try to use it for more robotic, repetitive tasks that can be quickly/easily checked and verified

nodes.label: AI verifiability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I am aware of the susceptibilities of AI models to hallucination or other methods by which they often come to the wrong conclusion

nodes.label: AI as productivity enhancer
nodes.grounding_span: AI will help me to efficiently and effortlessly complete the manual, robotic and rules-based elements of my job

nodes.label: Iterative prompt refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I've almost built up over time a more step-by-step set of prompt instructions to allow marginal improvements

nodes.label: AI as fundamental workplace tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI will quickly develop into one of those tools that workers are just expected to know how to use

nodes.label: Professional competence and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I do always try to sense-check any AI summary, to ensure it is actually accurate

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: AI will help me to efficiently and effortlessly complete the manual, robotic and rules-based elements

nodes.label: Job security and professional identity
nodes.grounding_span: I will always be responsible for the judgemental pieces that require more complex thinking

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for practical help
nodes.grounding_span: It has made me feel satisfied multiple times when I have asked for help in optimising my excel worksheets

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's inability to troubleshoot
nodes.grounding_span: I can feel frustrated with AI when I ask for help on how to do something, where perhaps the 'standard' process isn't working

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI for bounded tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI is a helpful tool, I think it still gets far too much wrong, and therefore cannot be blindly trusted

nodes.label: Optimistic expectation of AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: I can definitely see AI becoming more and more important and integral to my job role

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through repeated task cycles
nodes.grounding_span: I've almost built up over time a more step-by-step set of prompt instructions to allow marginal improvements

nodes.label: Task decomposition into verifiable vs. judgmental
nodes.grounding_span: I try to use it for more robotic, repetitive tasks that can be quickly/easily checked and verified for accuracy by myself
